steps.title: Identify the structure around the blank
steps.content: On the left: the transitive verb uses with its object (poetry rather than prose). On the right: the blank followed by a noun phrase (the true story...). The blank needs to be filled with a verb form.

steps.title: Apply the infinitive form
steps.content: to tell, is the infinitive that works here—it shows that Engle uses poetry to tell the story. The other three options are finite verb forms that do not function as infinitives. That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
